title: Tirutalinathar Temple
tagline: Tirutalinathar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tiruttalinathar temple is a Siva temple located in Thiruputhur near Karaikkudi.
overview.description: Tiruttalinathar temple is a Siva temple located in Thiruputhur near Karaikkudi. This temple is regarded as the 6th of the Tevara Stalams in the Pandya kingdom of Tamil Nadu. The temples Rameswaram and Tiruvadanai are the other Shivastalams nearby. It is one of the shrines of the 275 Paadal Petra Sthalams.

topPlaces.name: Tiruppattur, Sivaganga
topPlaces.description: Tiruppattur, also spelt Tiruppathur or Thiruppathur, is a Taluk, Town Panchayat in Sivaganga district in the India state of Tamil Nadu. This town is located 22 km from Karaikudi and 27 km from Sivaganga.

topPlaces.name: Karpaka Vinayakar Temple
topPlaces.description: Karpaka Vinayaka Temple or Pillaiyarpatti Pillaiyar Temple is a 7th-century-CE rock-cut cave shrine, significantly expanded over the later centuries. It is located in Pillayarpatti village in Tiruppathur Taluk, Sivaganga district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sowmya Narayana Perumal temple
topPlaces.description: Sowmyanarayana Perumal Temple is an ancient temple located in Thirukoshtiyur, a village in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Sowmyanarayana Perumal and his consort Lakshmi as Thirumamagal.

topPlaces.name: Kandiramanickkam, Tiruvarur
topPlaces.description: Kandiramanickkam is a village in the Thirupathur taluk of Sivagangai district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kandramanickam
topPlaces.description: Kandramanickam is a village in Sivaganga district, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Nachiapuram
topPlaces.description: Nachiapuram is a village located in Sivagangai District in the State of Tamil Nadu in India. Nachiapuram is a panchayat with elected members, and forms part of the Kallal Union.

items.note: Tiruppattur, also spelt Tiruppathur or Thiruppathur, is a Taluk, Town Panchayat in Sivaganga district in the India state of Tamil Nadu. This town is located 22 km from Karaikudi and 27 km from Sivaganga.

Karpaka Vinayaka Temple or Pillaiyarpatti Pillaiyar Temple is a 7th-century-CE rock-cut cave shrine, significantly expanded over the later centuries. It is located in Pillayarpatti village in Tiruppathur Taluk, Sivaganga district in Tamil Nadu, India.

Sowmyanarayana Perumal Temple is an ancient temple located in Thirukoshtiyur, a village in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Sowmyanarayana Perumal and his consort Lakshmi as Thirumamagal.
Kandiramanickkam is a village in the Thirupathur taluk of Sivagangai district in Tamil Nadu, India.
Kandramanickam is a village in Sivaganga district, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.
Nachiapuram is a village located in Sivagangai District in the State of Tamil Nadu in India. Nachiapuram is a panchayat with elected members, and forms part of the Kallal Union.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirutalinathar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirutalinathar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirutalinathar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (64 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (57 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirutalinathar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirutalinathar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirutalinathar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tirutalinathar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirutalinathar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tiruppattur, Sivaganga, Karpaka Vinayakar Temple, Sowmya Narayana Perumal temple, Kandiramanickkam, Tiruvarur, Kandramanickam.
